summary: Iranian-linked forces conducted missile and drone attacks on US bases in Kuwait, with Iranian state media confirming the strikes were in response to a US attack near Qeshm Island. Hezbollah's Islamic Resistance claimed an attack on an Israeli logistical vehicle (Himmet) on the southeastern outskirts of Yater Kafra in southern Lebanon using an Ababil attack drone. Israel intercepted hostile aerial targets crossing from Lebanon into the Manara and Kiryat Shmona areas, while sirens sounded across northern Israel.
key_points: Iranian Revolutionary Guard forces launched a massive missile and drone attack on US bases in Kuwait in retaliation for a US strike near Qeshm Island. (Source: @lelotsenzura/92453)

Hezbollah's Islamic Resistance claimed an attack at 13:50 on 02-06-2026 on an Israeli logistical vehicle (Himmet) on the southeastern outskirts of Yater Kafra using an Ababil attack drone. (Source: @rasedal3ado138e/365474)
IDF confirmed hostile aircraft intrusions in the Manara and Kiryat Shmona areas; a suspicious aerial target crossing from Lebanon was intercepted. (Source: @almogboker78/17292)

IRGC-affiliated Tasnim reported Iran has not responded to the US draft understanding and has suspended intermediary text exchanges until its conditions regarding Lebanon are met. (Source: @shin_persian/6480)

An explosion was heard in Qeshm and Bandar Abbas, Iran; Iranian media reported it was from detonation of unexploded ordnance, though initial reports described a powerful blast. (Source: @naya_foriraq/76888)
Two paramedics were reported killed following an Israeli drone strike on an ambulance in Shehour, southern Lebanon. (Source: @presstv/192478)
IDF eliminated a terrorist involved in the abduction of hostages from the Re'im junction shelter during the October 7 massacre. (Source: @idf_telegram/24108)

Bahrain closed its airspace, and Kuwait's Minister of Defense visited those injured in dawn attacks targeting civilian and vital facilities including Kuwait International Airport. (Source: @lelotsenzura/92458)

sections.executive_summary: Iranian-linked forces launched a significant missile and drone attack on US military bases in Kuwait, marking a major escalation in the regional conflict. Hezbollah's Islamic Resistance continued operations in southern Lebanon, claiming a drone strike on an Israeli logistical vehicle near Yater Kafra. Israel responded with aerial interceptions over its northern border while conducting targeted killings of October 7 perpetrators.

points: IRGC-affiliated Tasnim reported that Iran has not provided any response to the Americans regarding the draft understanding over the past several days, contradicting Trump's claims that negotiations are being approved. Iran has effectively suspended the exchange of texts via intermediaries until its conditions concerning Lebanon are met. (Source: @shin_persian/6480)
The Khatam Al-Anbiya Headquarters stated that the US and Israel will not be allowed to achieve their objectives against Iran, signaling a firm defensive posture. (Source: @presstv/192457)

An explosion was heard in Qeshm and Bandar Abbas; Iranian media reported the sound was from the detonation of unexploded war ordnance, though initial reports described a powerful blast with significant shockwaves. (Source: @naya_foriraq/76888)

Iranian media reported that an oil supertanker was seen loading oil at Kharg Island for the first time in four weeks, though storage conditions on the mainland remain critical. (Source: @SharghDaily/163669)
Iranian Revolutionary Guard forces launched a massive missile and drone attack on US bases in Kuwait in response to a US attack near Qeshm Island. (Source: @lelotsenzura/92453)

The IDF confirmed hostile aircraft intrusions in the Manara and Kiryat Shmona areas; a suspicious aerial target crossing from Lebanon from Lebanese airspace into Israeli territory was intercepted. Red alerts were activated in Manara, Margaliot, Kiryat Shmona, and Tzofar. (Source: @almogboker78/17292)
The IDF intercepted two launches that crossed from Lebanon into Israeli territory in the Merhavim area following alerts in the Merhavim region. (Source: @New_security8200/200920)

The IDF eliminated a terrorist who participated in the abduction of Hersh Goldberg-Polin, Eli Cohen, Alon Ahl, and Or Levy from the roadside bomb shelter at the Re'im junction during the October 7 massacre. (Source: @idf_telegram/24108)
A vehicle was struck on a highway near Khaldah in Lebanon, with security reports from the field without censorship. (Source: @lelotsenzura/92463)

IDF Spokesperson announced June as the month of appreciation for reservists and their families, with events planned including an employment fair in Afula on 07.06.26 and a ceremony at the President's Residence on 08.06.26. (Source: @New_security8200/200916)
The head of the Operations Division, Brig. Gen. Israel Shomer, was investigated by the Military Police following suspicions of moral and integrity offenses. (Source: @almogboker78/17284)

A Hamas terrorist who participated in abducting Israeli hostages from a roadside bomb shelter near the Gaza border community of Re'im during the October 7 massacre was eliminated by the IDF. (Source: @idf_telegram/24108)

A terrorist involved in keeping the body of soldier Oron Shaul for ten years inside a refrigerator at his business confessed during a joint investigation by Lahav 433 and the Shin Bet; an indictment is expected soon. (Source: @pkpoi/142391)

A fighter from the Kfir Brigade who manned a nearby security post neutralized the terrorist in the Gush Etzion junction attack on Sunday evening, in which two girls were injured. (Source: @idf_telegram/24106)

Hezbollah's Islamic Resistance claimed an attack at 13:50 on 02-06-2026 on an Israeli logistical vehicle (Himmet) on the southeastern outskirts of Yater Kafra using an Ababil attack drone, achieving a confirmed hit. The attack was in response to Israeli violations of the ceasefire and assaults on villages in southern Lebanon. (Source: @rasedal3ado138e/365474)

The Islamic Resistance also released thermal imaging footage from the 01-06-2026 operation targeting a gathering of Israeli soldiers on the southern outskirts of Yater Kafra using an Ababil attack drone. (Source: @naya_foriraq/76892)
Two paramedics were reported killed following an Israeli drone strike that targeted an ambulance in the town of Shehour, southern Lebanon. (Source: @presstv/192478)

The Lebanese Ministry of Public Health responded to Israeli claims about Tebnin Government Hospital, stating it is the only hospital in the Bint Jbeil district, hosts Red Cross and Lebanese Red Cross centers, and has a Lebanese Army fixed point at its entrance. (Source: @rasedal3ado138e/365505)
A vehicle was struck on a highway near Khaldah, Lebanon. (Source: @lelotsenzura/92463)

IDF Arabic spokesman Avichay Adraee issued an urgent warning to residents of Lebanon, specifically the residents of Kharayeb, stating that the IDF is forced to act forcefully against Hezbollah for violating the ceasefire and targeting Israel's home front. (Source: @shin_persian/6461)
No specific operational developments regarding Syria or Iraq were reported in the provided messages beyond the Iranian attacks on US bases in Kuwait and related regional posturing.
Iranian Revolutionary Guard forces launched a massive missile and drone attack on US bases in Kuwait in response to a US attack near Qeshm Island. (Source: @lelotsenzura/92453)

Israeli media reported that during the Iranian attack, damage was inflicted on the US base Ali Al-Salem in Kuwait, with reports indicating an aircraft and drone depot at the base was targeted. (Source: @SharghDaily/163660)
Kuwait's Minister of Defense visited those injured in dawn attacks targeting civilian and vital facilities, including Kuwait International Airport. (Source: @shin_persian/6473)
Bahrain closed its airspace, according to security reports from the field. (Source: @lelotsenzura/92458)
Images from Kuwait International Airport were circulated following what was described as a terrorist attack by the IRGC. (Source: @rodast_omiddana/72495)

key_developments: Iranian Revolutionary Guard forces launched a massive missile and drone attack on US bases in Kuwait in retaliation for a US attack near Qeshm Island, marking a significant escalation in direct Iran-US military confrontation. (Source: @lelotsenzura/92453)

Hezbollah's Islamic Resistance claimed a drone attack at 13:50 on 02-06-2026 on an Israeli logistical vehicle (Himmet) on the southeastern outskirts of Yater Kafra in southern Lebanon using an Ababil attack drone, achieving a confirmed hit in response to Israeli ceasefire violations. (Source: @rasedal3ado138e/365474)

The IDF confirmed hostile aircraft intrusions in the Manara and Kiryat Shmona areas, with a suspicious aerial target crossing from Lebanon into Israeli territory being intercepted; red alerts were activated across multiple northern Israeli communities. (Source: @almogboker78/17292)

IRGC-affiliated Tasnim reported Iran has suspended all intermediary communications with the US over the draft nuclear understanding, directly contradicting Trump's claims that negotiations are progressing, citing Israeli crimes in Lebanon as the reason. (Source: @shin_persian/6480)

Two paramedics were reported killed following an Israeli drone strike on an ambulance in Shehour, southern Lebanon, while the Lebanese Ministry of Public Health defended the civilian nature of Tebnin Government Hospital against Israeli claims. (Source: @presstv/192478)

The IDF eliminated a Hamas terrorist who participated in the abduction of Hersh Goldberg-Polin and other hostages from the Re'im junction shelter during the October 7 massacre, as part of ongoing targeted operations. (Source: @idf_telegram/24108)

Kuwait's Minister of Defense visited those injured in dawn attacks targeting civilian and vital facilities including Kuwait International Airport, while Bahrain closed its airspace amid the regional escalation. (Source: @shin_persian/6473)
sections.threat_assessment: The regional threat level has escalated significantly with direct Iranian missile and drone attacks on US military installations in Kuwait, representing a major expansion of the conflict beyond the Israel-Hezbollah-Gaza axis. Hezbollah continues to conduct drone operations in southern Lebanon despite the ceasefire, targeting Israeli military assets near Yater Kafra. Israel faces multi-border aerial threats, with hostile aircraft and rocket launches crossing from Lebanon into northern Israeli communities including Manara, Kiryat Shmona, and Tzofar. The suspension of US-Iran intermediary communications increases the risk of miscalculation and prolonged escalation.
sections.regional_response: Gulf states are directly impacted, with Kuwait suffering attacks on its international airport and US bases on its territory, prompting high-level government responses including the Defense Minister visiting the injured. Bahrain preemptively closed its airspace in response to the escalating threats. Iran's Khatam Al-Anbiya Headquarters issued a defiant statement warning the US and Israel against achieving their objectives. Israel's Prime Minister reportedly informed local council heads that a solution for explosive-laden drones has been found and will be implemented in the coming days.
sections.intelligence_notes: The Iranian attack on Kuwait appears to be a calibrated response to a reported US strike near Qeshm Island, suggesting a pattern of tit-for-tat escalation between Iran and the US that risks further broadening the conflict. Hezbollah's continued operations in southern Lebanon, including the use of Ababil attack drones with thermal imaging guidance, indicate the group retains significant military capability despite the ceasefire agreement. The IRGC's Tasnim explicitly linking the suspension of nuclear negotiations to Israeli actions in Lebanon demonstrates Iran's strategy of leveraging the Axis of Resistance as a unified bargaining chip. Reports of explosions in Qeshm and Bandar Abbas being attributed to unexploded ordnance disposal may indicate prior undisclosed military activity or strikes in Iranian territory.
